name: FilmWorld: Agentic Novel-to-Film Generation through Dynamic Cinematic World Modeling

description: arXiv:2607.19038v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Translating novels into films poses a grand challenge for generative artificial intelligence, requiring conversion of abstract literary prose into long-form, multi-scene visual narratives. While current video generation models excel at short, single-scene clips within narrow temporal and spatial contexts, novel-to-film generation operates in a m...
author: Jialong Zuo, Haotong Zuo, Shiwei Zhang, Xiang Wang, Chen Li, Nong Sang, Changxin Gao, Xiang Bai
